title: Racosperma nyssophyllum

This plant has been traditionally used in Australian folk medicine, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as the potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Racosperma nyssophyllum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
